tasks.name: Initialise Node.js project with package.json
Create folder structure as per LLD Section 5.1
Install dependencies: express, googleapis, axios, dotenv
Create .env.example with all required env variable names
Create README.md with setup and run instructions
Implement configReader.js — authenticate with Google Sheets API using service account
Read Tab 1 (Features) and return structured feature manifest
Read Tab 2 (Slack Channels) and attach to each feature
Read Tab 3 (Run State) and attach last-run timestamps
Filter out features where Active = N
Write unit test: mock sheet data → verify manifest structure
Implement sheetWriter.js — authenticate and connect to Output Sheet
Implement upsertFeatures() — upsert rows by Feature ID
Implement upsertScopeRegistry() — upsert by (Feature ID + Task Name) composite key
Implement appendChangelog() — append with dedup by Source Message ID
Implement appendRunLog() — always append, never update
Implement writeAll() — accepts aggregated result and calls all above
Implement Confluence API client — authenticate using API token + email
Implement getPage() — fetch by ID, strip HTML to clean text
Implement prdExtractor.js — Claude API call for structured feature list
Implement snapshot storage in runState.json with timestamp
Implement diffEngine.js — compare new vs previous snapshot
Implement prdPipeline.js — orchestrate above, return changelog entries
Implement UAT sheet reader — fetch rows + headers from configured URL
Implement latest-column detector — find highest-numbered UAT Status column
Implement rules engine — apply disposition mapping from Section 9
Implement version inference — derive next version from current target
Implement uatPipeline.js — orchestrate above, return changelog entries
Implement Slack API client — authenticate with bot token
Implement channel history fetcher — get messages since last_slack_run
Implement thread fetcher — fetch full thread for messages with replies
Implement keyword pre-filter — discard threads with zero matching keywords
Implement classifier.js — Claude API call per thread, return structured JSON
Implement slackPipeline.js — per-channel error isolation, return changelog entries
Implement orchestrator.js — Promise.allSettled across all 3 pipelines
Implement result aggregator — collect results + errors from all pipelines
Update Run State in config sheet Tab 3 after successful run
Implement index.js — Express server with /health and /run endpoints
Add retry utility (3 attempts, exponential backoff) wrapping all external calls
Add structured terminal logging for each pipeline step
End-to-end test with mock data for all 3 pipelines
Verify dedup: run pipeline twice, confirm no duplicate changelog entries
Verify resilience: simulate PRD failure, confirm UAT and Slack still complete
Create Procfile for Railway/Render deployment
Document all env variables and deployment steps in README.md
Test /health and /run endpoints via curl
